overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit market stalls, futuristic outdoor bars with glowing furniture, and massive digital billboards. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing the atmospheric streets of Night City with heavy rain, fog, and reflective wet surfaces.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated tree-lined promenade during a heavy rainstorm at night, overlooking neon-lit market stalls below. The path is bordered by wooden railings and dense canopy trees, with colorful digital screens visible through the foliage.

segments.scene_description: Moving under concrete overpasses through a covered walkway, sheltered from the rain. The area is dimly lit with artificial lighting, with support pillars lining the path and distant neon signs visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lush, elevated promenade down into the neon-drenched depths of a rain-soaked urban center. It begins along a tree-lined walkway bordered by wooden railings, where colorful digital screens flicker through a dense canopy during a heavy night storm. As the camera descends a ramp, the open rain gives way to the shelter of a massive concrete overpass, passing a vibrant outdoor bar filled with patrons on glowing neon stools. The scene then opens into a wide, reflective plaza illuminated by towering digital billboards and street lights, moving past pedestrians with umbrellas toward the dominant pink neon sign of the TENGU building. Finally, the path shifts back into the dim artificial light of a covered walkway, gliding beneath concrete support pillars as distant neon signs fade into the hazy night.
